key_points: New dorms actively recruiting top students as incentive
Freshmen banned from having cars on campus, workarounds exist
Older housing being demolished with replacement plans unclear
key_quotes: FAMU's new dorms are a draw for top students. It's part of a bigger trend.
FAMU demolishes aging campus complex, with replacement plans still unclear.
I NEED to have my car with me but don't know where I could park.

key_points: Marching 100 band is the undisputed cultural centerpiece of campus
Gospel choir, cheerleading, and athletics create strong community energy
Students actively seeking friend groups, suggesting social navigation takes effort
key_quotes: Who else can be the main attraction at a football game and not be the football team?
Is there a FAMU club to make friends? I'm looking to make friends.
I'm looking for friends for Tallahassee FL.

key_points: No meaningful student data on dining quality or options available
Campus food experience not mentioned in any tours or reviews
Tallahassee's Black-owned restaurant scene praised as a cultural asset nearby
key_quotes: More than a meal: How Black-owned restaurants are shaping Tallahassee's culture.

key_points: No dedicated mental health support resources mentioned by students
Financial stress and bureaucratic failures are clear stressors for students
Transfer student described surgery, SAP disqualification, and aid cutoff hitting simultaneously
key_quotes: I submitted a SAP appeal for the fall, but approval came too late... I only found out by checking the financial aid website.
I turned my life around 3 years ago. I was strung out. I came from a crappy family.

key_points: SAP appeal process is slow, opaque, and punishing for students in crisis
Out-of-state enrollment cap means OOS students should apply Early Action
Students report getting summer admission when they applied for fall, complicating aid
key_quotes: In October, I was disqualified from SAP for not attending the fall semester, but I only found out by checking the financial aid website.
We were advised to apply Early Action due to the limit on OOS.
I need to get a loan because I'm not getting anything from the government and I haven't heard back from any scholarships.

key_points: Pharmacy program has a strong, loyal alumni base and inspires many
Biology program questioned versus Xavier for pre-med pipeline strength
Forbes ranked FAMU online programs #1 among HBCUs; new PhD in Biology approved
key_quotes: The math started looking like the Matrix.
Xula is a much bigger school for pre-med. Three times as many med school applicants, even though it is a much smaller school.
This has inspired me to fulfill my dream of attending FAMU and majoring in pharmacy.

key_points: New president Marva Johnson strongly disapproved by campus community before taking office
Alumni delivered 'scathing rebuke' at Board of Trustees meeting publicly
Financial leadership instability: another fiscal officer departing amid uncertainty
key_quotes: Poll shows FAMU community strongly disapproves of incoming president Marva Johnson just days before her term begins.
FAMU alums deliver scathing rebuke of President Johnson at BOT meeting.
Maybe someone will finally answer the phone now and actually start helping students and potential students.

key_points: Tallahassee is affordable; FSU proximity creates a parallel college-town atmosphere
FAMU Law School is in Orlando, not Tallahassee — a key surprise for law hopefuls
Campus is evolving with new facilities but some older buildings being torn down
key_quotes: I would love to see a tour of our College of Law, located in Orlando.
It's good to know that it's evolved since my days as a student at FAMU.
Much of what this video presents are new offerings from my days as a student at FAMU.

key_points: Notable alumni include NASA engineer, U.S. Rep., and Georgia governor candidate
Pharmacy graduates report strong career outcomes and NAPLEX readiness
HBCU network and alumni loyalty appear to be real professional assets
key_quotes: FAMU grad Lakiesha Hawkins helped steer NASA's Artemis II into history.
Saw this video a long time ago when I was still enlisted in the Army. Bam! I start medical school in Texas in July.
I went to pharmacy school and got registered. Thank you, still love this video.

key_points: Out-of-state students face steep costs with limited merit aid clarity
Florida Bright Futures scholarship makes in-state attendance very cost-effective
Students frequently choosing FAMU as safety but unsure about financial packages
key_quotes: Famu is my first choice... My parents cannot provide me with a straight answer when I ask them if they can afford to help me pay.
I qualify for 75% bright futures and I got a 1000 dollar scholarship from a fraternity.
I need to get a loan because I'm not getting anything from the government.

key_points: Strong Black cultural identity and pride is the school's defining characteristic
Community feel is genuine; alumni remain deeply emotionally connected to FAMU
Bureaucratic friction is real, but students who stick through it feel rewarded
key_quotes: Everything we do is epic, one of a kind and full of cultural significance.
I went to FSU but probably should have gone to FAMU… just being close to all that went on there was exciting.
I've dreamed of going to FAMU since I was a little girl.

key_points: Administration: new president opposed by community, alumni, and BOT before day one
Admissions: transcripts frequently lost or unprocessed, applications cancelled without warning
Financial Aid: SAP disqualification notices sent only via portal, no proactive outreach to students
key_quotes: Your application has been cancelled for the term which you applied for admission... I have proof on my side that I sent everything.
I was disqualified from SAP for not attending the fall semester, but I only found out by checking the financial aid website.
FAMU sees donor exodus despite fundraising bump as leadership alienates base.

key_points: Marching 100 is a nationally recognized performance institution, not just a band
Gospel choir is extraordinary in quality — viral-level performances on record
$4 million student investment fund gives business students real Wall Street experience
key_quotes: This is Mozart, Handel and Bach all rolled into one.
With $4 million fund, FAMU students get a real-world shot at Wall Street.
Who else can be the main attraction at a football game and not be the football team?
